info.title: DCMS API
info.description: Generic Docker Container Management System REST API. Provides full lifecycle management of containers, images, networks, volumes, clusters, monitoring, logging, and user administration across multi-host Docker Swarm deployments.

tags.name: clusters
tags.description: Docker Swarm cluster and node management

post.summary: Authenticate user and obtain JWT tokens
Obtain a new access token using a refresh token
Revoke the current session and invalidate refresh token

get.summary: List containers with optional filters and pagination

post.summary: Create and optionally start a new container

get.summary: Get detailed information about a specific container

delete.summary: Remove a container (must be stopped first unless force=true)

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Force removal of a running container

parameters.name: remove_volumes
parameters.description: Remove anonymous volumes attached to the container

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Seconds to wait before killing the container

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Seconds to wait before killing the container

get.summary: Stream container logs as Server-Sent Events

parameters.name: tail
parameters.description: Number of lines to show from end of logs before streaming

parameters.name: follow
parameters.description: Whether to stream new log lines

schema.description: Server-Sent Events stream. Each event is a JSON-encoded LogEntry.

get.summary: Stream container resource statistics as Server-Sent Events

parameters.name: stream
parameters.description: If false, return a single snapshot and close

schema.description: Server-Sent Events stream. Each event is a JSON-encoded ContainerStats.

post.summary: Execute a command inside a running container

env.description: Additional environment variables in KEY=VALUE format

get.summary: List images available on managed hosts

parameters.name: host_id
parameters.description: Filter to images on a specific host

post.summary: Pull an image from a registry

registry.description: Registry hostname; defaults to Docker Hub

auth.description: Registry credentials (stored in Vault, referenced by name instead)

host_ids.description: Target host IDs to pull to; defaults to all hosts

delete.summary: Delete an image from a managed host

post.summary: Trigger a vulnerability scan for an image

get.summary: Retrieve the latest vulnerability scan results for an image
List Docker networks across managed hosts
List Docker volumes across managed hosts
List Docker Swarm clusters managed by DCMS
List all Swarm nodes across clusters

post.summary: Drain a Swarm node to prepare it for maintenance
Re-activate a drained or paused Swarm node

get.summary: Query current metrics for a host or container

parameters.name: step
parameters.description: Resolution step for range queries (Prometheus duration syntax)

get.summary: Full-text search across aggregated container logs (Loki-backed)
List users in the caller's organisation

post.summary: Invite a new user to the organisation

200.description: Invitation sent; user record created in pending state

ContainerId.name: id
ContainerId.description: Docker container ID (short or full 64-char hash)

ImageId.name: id
ImageId.description: Docker image ID (sha256 digest or repository:tag)

BearerAuth.description: RS256-signed JWT issued by /auth/login. Include as: Authorization: Bearer <token>

Container.description: Represents a Docker container managed by DCMS

host_id.description: DCMS host record ID for the Docker daemon

ContainerCreateRequest.description: Payload to create a new container

name.description: Optional container name; auto-generated if omitted

user.description: UID or UID:GID to run the container as

ContainerStats.description: Point-in-time resource utilisation snapshot for a container

cpu_percent.description: CPU usage as a percentage of total host CPU

Image.description: Docker image record as tracked by DCMS

host_ids.description: DCMS host IDs that have this image

ImageScanResult.description: Vulnerability scan results for a Docker image

containers.description: Map of container ID to network endpoint info

size_bytes.description: Physical size; -1 if unsupported by driver

ref_count.description: Number of containers using this volume

Alert.description: Prometheus Alertmanager alert surfaced through DCMS API

LogEntry.description: Single log line from aggregated container logs

level.description: Parsed log level if present in message

x-enum-descriptions.admin: Full platform access including user management
x-enum-descriptions.operator: Can manage containers, images, networks, volumes
x-enum-descriptions.auditor: Read-only access to audit logs and security events only

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error envelope returned for all 4xx and 5xx responses

trace_id.description: Distributed trace ID for log correlation

PaginatedResponse.description: Pagination envelope — concrete responses extend this with a typed `data` array
